About the game A fragmented signal has been intercepted from the ruins of Veylora, a once-thriving metropolis now buried under silence. Years ago, the city became the battleground of two colossal beings—Orinox and Velthara—whose clash reshaped the land and left behind a zone no one dares to enter. Yet somehow, a faint distress call has made its way through the interference. As part of the Civil Rescue Unit, you are dispatched into the forbidden remains. Navigate through unstable streets where the ground itself shifts without warning. Evade sudden energy surges that still ripple through the air like echoes of the ancient battle. Collapsed structures, hidden voids, and lingering anomalies turn every step into a risk. But you are not alone—somewhere in the depths, survivors are holding on. Push forward through the ruins, make impossible choices under pressure, and uncover what truly happened in Veylora. The truth lies buried beneath the destruction… and not everything in the city is as lifeless as it seems.

Game Info

Controls: W, A, S, D: Navigate & move Space: Confirm

Game Type 2D Pixel Adventure
Platform Windows 10 / 11
Theme Monsters, ruins, survival
